title: Complementary SMP Modpack
description: A fully optional, vanilla-focused modpack, designed specifically to provide the best gameplay and visual quality for members of the ComplementarySMP, enabling server side features, and allowing you to enjoy the SMP to its fullest.
body:
# Complementary SMP Modpack

This **Fabric** modpack has the simple purpose of providing members of the ComplementarySMP a straightforward and easy way to play and enjoy the server. Its vanilla-oriented direction means that none of these mods are required to join the SMP, and are **completely optional**. 

![CompSMP's current spawn.](https://i.imgur.com/ZVG9A3L.png)

### Server features

Apart from including mods that will improve your performance in the SMP and the game in general, the CompSMP Modpack also has a number of **server-side mods** that must also be installed in the client for you to be able to use them in the SMP. 

### Quality of Life

The CompSMP Modpack provides quality-of-life mods that will improve your vanilla experience, by fixing various bugs, providing helpful GUI shortcuts, and many optional tweaks.

### Custom configuration options

The CompSMP Modpack also includes customized configurations for the game and the mods installed. These are specifically tailored towards the enjoyment of the ComplementarySMP.

### Shaders and Resource Packs

The latest version of Complementary Reimagined will also be included in the modpack, as well as some vanilla-enhancing resource packs and mods.

### Up to date

The mods in the CompSMP Modpack will be kept up to date to their latest versions compatible with the ComplementarySMP's Minecraft version.

### ComplementarySMP

If you are interested in joining the ComplementarySMP, join the [Complementary Shaders](https://discord.gg/complementary) discord server, and apply to join the SMP in the [application channel](https://discord.com/channels/744189556768636941/869173325530800158).

### Credits

- This modpack includes [EminGT's](https://modrinth.com/user/EminGT) Complementary Reimagined shaderpack: [Complementary Website](https://www.complementary.dev/).
We take responsibility for any problems or issues that may arise from the use of this shaderpack in this modpack. 

- This modpack includes [Xaero96's](https://www.curseforge.com/members/xaero96/followers) [Xaero's Minimap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap), [Xaero's WorldMap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map), [Open Parties and Claims](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/open-parties-and-claims) and [Xaero Zoomout](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaero-zoom-out) mods.

- This modpack includes [Vanilla Tweaks'](https://vanillatweaks.net/) resource packs.

- This modpack includes the [Circular Sun and Moon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/circular-sun-and-moon) resource pack.

- This modpack includes the [Consistent Chains](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/consistent-chains-java-edition/) resource pack.

**The following are used with [permission](https://discord.com/channels/734077874708938864/1095082199721713805/1095373630441013349) from their original authors:**

- This modpack includes the [Rain Revamp](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/rain-revamp) resource pack.

- This modpack includes the [Authentic Shadows](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/authentic-shadows) resource pack.

- This modpack includes the [Better Yellow Glass](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ZG54bkn0BUhvC6T-qyYompVxx2Ijvw-E/view) resource pack.

- This modpack includes the [Enhanced Sun](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enhanced-sun) resource pack.

- This modpack includes the [Name Pain](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/name-pain) mod.

- This modpack includes the following resource packs by [carriecare](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/carriecare/):
    - [Adjusted Acacia](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/adjusted-acacia/)
    - [Fantastic Flora](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/fantastic-flora/)
    - [Blazed Brewing Stand](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/blazed-brewing-stand/)
    - [Roundish Log Tops](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/roundish-log-tops/)
